creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 183747
kodi.diff

I've recently submitted a new audio engine for audio/sndio to Kodi and it was
merged last month (https://github.com/xbmc/xbmc/pull/11962).  I've been using it
for over a year now and I'd like to it add it to the port if possible until Kodi 
18 is out.

The patch adds an SNDIO option (off by default) and includes a backport of the
backend via an extra patch, so the build shouldn't be affected in any way 
normally unless users select SNDIO=on.

Poudriere test builds are fine on 11.0/amd64 and 12.0-r317732/amd64
